news.title: What does it mean to make art with code? — the generative artist behind Fidenza, QQL, Incomplete Control, Day Gardens, and more — answers in our new documentary  Plus: the curation of OpenSea's QQL, by Tyler himself. Chapters: [0:00](https://x.com/opensea/status/2057506958912188642?t=0) Art Meets Community [0:37](https://x.com/opensea/status/2057506958912188642?t=37)

Joining OpenSea's Flagship Collection… Nouns by — a fully on-chain, CC0 generative art experiment that auctions one new Noun every 24 hours, forever, with 100% of proceeds flowing to The Nouns treasury. More below

The Nouns experiment launched on Ethereum on August 8, 2021, and was founded by an anonymous group of 10 contributors known as the Nounders. Each Noun is a 32x32 pixel character assembled from a fixed library of traits — 2 backgrounds, 31 bodies, 145 accessories, 258 heads, and

shipped support for subscription nfts (ERC-5643 by and the opensea api  this gets really interesting for tool creators. using subscription nfts to gate agentic tool calls, with tiered access built in, opens up a lot if you're building agent tools or
